articles.author: Amanda Silberling
articles.title: ‘Pokémon Pokopia’ is a game about rehabilitating a broken world — and I love it - TechCrunch
articles.description: The latest Pokémon game is a cozy life simulator like "Animal Crossing" or "Minecraft," but in a way that feels more grounded to our actual world.
articles.content: On Friday night, my boyfriend and I sat on the couch for a refreshing evening of doing nothing together. We tuned into a baseball game, he picked up my guitar, and I eagerly booted up “Pokémon Pokopi… [+6900 chars]

articles.title: NASA and SpaceX disagree about manual controls for lunar lander - Ars Technica
articles.description: NASA’s tracking of SpaceX’s manual control risk indicates a worsening trend."
